old_value: {"id":"red-dragon-2vi","title":"JS/TS for-loop update field not extracted by tree-sitter","description":"Tree-sitter JS grammar doesn't provide an 'update' named field for C-style for loops. lower_c_style_for in interpreter/frontends/common/control_flow.py gets None for update_node, causing infinite loops. JS/TS for-loops with updates need positional extraction or custom handling. Discovered during array accumulate Rosetta test.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"asgupta@thoughtworks.com","created_at":"2026-03-11T07:25:18Z","created_by":"avishek-sen-gupta","updated_at":"2026-03-11T07:25:18Z"}

old_value: {"id":"red-dragon-gsl","title":"Interface-aware type inference: cross-language enhancement","description":"Make type inference resolve method return types through interface/trait declarations. Currently Java/C#/TS/Kotlin/Go lower interfaces as data objects (NEW_OBJECT), discarding method type signatures. Scala/Rust/PHP already lower them as CLASS blocks, so method types flow implicitly. Fix: (1) Align Java/C#/TS interface lowering to process method bodies like Scala/Rust/PHP, (2) Add interface_implementations chain walk to _infer_call_method(), (3) Wire extend_with_interfaces() into production.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"asgupta@thoughtworks.com","created_at":"2026-03-11T09:17:32Z","created_by":"avishek-sen-gupta","updated_at":"2026-03-11T09:17:32Z"}

new_value: {"description":"fn\u003cstring\u003e — instantiation without calling. NOT a no-op: must lower the function child as an expression (LOAD_VAR etc.) and discard type_arguments (type erasure). Without a handler, falls through to SYMBOLIC. Pattern: extract function field, ctx.lower_expr() it, ignore type_arguments."}
old_value: {"id":"red-dragon-gvu.2.2.1","title":"TS: instantiation_expression","description":"fn\u003cstring\u003e — instantiation without calling","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"asgupta@thoughtworks.com","created_at":"2026-03-11T11:30:37Z","created_by":"avishek-sen-gupta","updated_at":"2026-03-11T11:30:37Z"}

new_value: {"description":"declare module/function/class/var/enum/type/global — purely type-level, stripped by TS compiler. Verified no-op: emit nothing. All 9 child declaration variants produce zero runtime code."}
old_value: {"id":"red-dragon-gvu.2.2.2","title":"TS: ambient_declaration","description":"declare module 'x' { ... }","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"asgupta@thoughtworks.com","created_at":"2026-03-11T11:30:37Z","created_by":"avishek-sen-gupta","updated_at":"2026-03-11T11:30:37Z"}

new_value: {"description":"Both have real runtime semantics. import Foo = Bar.Baz compiles to var Foo = Bar.Baz (LOAD_VAR/LOAD_FIELD chain + STORE_VAR). import x = require(y) compiles to var x = require(y) (CONST + CALL_FUNCTION + STORE_VAR). However, regular import_statement is already no-op in our frontend. Decision: treat consistently with other imports (no-op) or implement runtime bindings. Note: import_require_clause is child of import_statement; import_alias is standalone top-level declaration."}
old_value: {"id":"red-dragon-gvu.2.2.5","title":"TS: import_alias and import_require_clause","description":"import Foo = Bar.Baz and import x = require('y')","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"asgupta@thoughtworks.com","created_at":"2026-03-11T11:30:38Z","created_by":"avishek-sen-gupta","updated_at":"2026-03-11T11:30:38Z"}

{"id":"red-dragon-gsl.7.3.10","title":"Type inference: label-keyed func_signatures for overload support","description":"func_signatures is keyed by function name, so overloads overwrite each other. Add func_signatures_by_label (label → FunctionSignature) to TypeEnvironment for overload-safe signature lookup. Keep existing name-keyed func_signatures for backward compat. The overload resolver in .7.3.2 will use the label-keyed version.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"asgupta@thoughtworks.com","created_at":"2026-03-12T09:59:24Z","created_by":"avishek-sen-gupta","updated_at":"2026-03-12T09:59:24Z"}

{"id":"red-dragon-gsl.7.3.11","title":"FunctionSignature: add FunctionKind enum (UNBOUND/INSTANCE/STATIC)","description":"FunctionSignature has no structural way to distinguish instance methods from static methods from top-level functions. The only signal is a fragile string convention (param named 'this'). Add a FunctionKind enum and a 'kind' field to FunctionSignature, plus a callable_params property that excludes 'this' for instance methods. Frontends set the kind during lowering/inference based on class context.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"asgupta@thoughtworks.com","created_at":"2026-03-12T11:06:42Z","created_by":"avishek-sen-gupta","updated_at":"2026-03-12T11:06:42Z"}

{"id":"red-dragon-gsl.7.3.11","title":"FunctionSignature: add FunctionKind enum (UNBOUND/INSTANCE/STATIC)","description":"FunctionSignature has no structural way to distinguish instance methods from static methods from top-level functions. The only signal is a fragile string convention (param named 'this'). Add a FunctionKind enum and a 'kind' field to FunctionSignature, plus a callable_params property that excludes 'this' for instance methods. Frontends set the kind during lowering/inference based on class context.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"avishek-sen-gupta","owner":"asgupta@thoughtworks.com","created_at":"2026-03-12T11:06:42Z","created_by":"avishek-sen-gupta","updated_at":"2026-03-12T11:07:15Z"}

{"id":"red-dragon-gsl.7.3.12","title":"Unify func_signatures and method_signatures into single container","description":"func_signatures (flat, str-keyed) and method_signatures (class-scoped, TypeExpr-keyed) are two separate containers that get_func_signature already abstracts over. Unify into a single method_signatures dict where unbound functions go under a sentinel key (UNKNOWN). Removes the dual-container split from TypeEnvironment, _InferenceContext, and TypeEnvironmentBuilder. External API (get_func_signature) unchanged.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"asgupta@thoughtworks.com","created_at":"2026-03-12T11:13:47Z","created_by":"avishek-sen-gupta","updated_at":"2026-03-12T11:13:47Z"}

{"id":"red-dragon-oej","title":"Replace constructor result_reg=None hack with is_ctor flag on StackFrame","description":"Current approach: _handle_call_dispatch_setup re-detects constructor calls via scope chain walk and sets result_reg=None to prevent __init__'s return value from clobbering the object address. This is fragile (had a scope chain bug) and redundant (_try_class_constructor_call already knows).

Clean approach:
1. Add is_ctor: bool = False to StackFramePush and StackFrame
2. _try_class_constructor_call sets is_ctor=True
3. _handle_return checks vm.current_frame.is_ctor — if true, produces typed(None, scalar(Void)) regardless of operands (constructors are void)
4. _handle_return_flow: skip write if return value is Void, write if None or concrete
5. Remove constructor detection from _handle_call_dispatch_setup entirely
6. Remove result_reg=None hack

Note: JS constructor explicit object return edge case tracked separately in red-dragon-4hz.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"asgupta@thoughtworks.com","created_at":"2026-03-12T22:06:53Z","created_by":"avishek-sen-gupta","updated_at":"2026-03-12T22:06:53Z"}

{"id":"red-dragon-oej","title":"Replace constructor result_reg=None hack with is_ctor flag on StackFrame","description":"Current approach: _handle_call_dispatch_setup re-detects constructor calls via scope chain walk and sets result_reg=None to prevent __init__'s return value from clobbering the object address. This is fragile (had a scope chain bug) and redundant (_try_class_constructor_call already knows).

Clean approach:
1. Add is_ctor: bool = False to StackFramePush and StackFrame
2. _try_class_constructor_call sets is_ctor=True
3. _handle_return checks vm.current_frame.is_ctor — if true, produces typed(None, scalar(Void)) regardless of operands (constructors are void)
4. _handle_return_flow: skip write if return value is Void, write if None or concrete
5. Remove constructor detection from _handle_call_dispatch_setup entirely
6. Remove result_reg=None hack

Note: JS constructor explicit object return edge case tracked separately in red-dragon-4hz.","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"avishek-sen-gupta","owner":"asgupta@thoughtworks.com","created_at":"2026-03-12T22:06:53Z","created_by":"avishek-sen-gupta","updated_at":"2026-03-12T22:07:10Z"}

{"id":"red-dragon-koc","title":"PHP lower_php_enum_case uses bare constants.PARAM_SELF in STORE_FIELD","description":"In interpreter/frontends/php/declarations.py, lower_php_enum_case emits STORE_FIELD with constants.PARAM_SELF ('self') as the object operand instead of using a register from LOAD_VAR.
